meta.title: Dominik Machowiak | Web Developer, Marketing Automation & DominikOS
meta.description: Websites for real businesses, marketing automation, React and DominikOS: a retro desktop version of Dominik Machowiak's portfolio.

hero.role: Web developer, marketing automation developer, and builder of DominikOS.
hero.tagline: Websites for real businesses, marketing automation, a bit of React, and a portfolio that turned into a retro desktop with games in it. That's what you'll find here.

items.title: Websites for real businesses
items.description: I've designed and built websites for a property-management company and a cleaning business, using HTML, CSS and JavaScript to put their services and offers online.

items.title: Automation, not just interfaces
items.description: I also work in Salesforce Marketing Cloud at Deloitte: technical consultation, marketing automation and a multi-brand automotive transformation with around 300 email and SMS messages.

items.title: Still adding to the toolkit
items.description: HTML, CSS and JavaScript are where I started. React sits alongside them now, and this portfolio includes projects that go well beyond a normal project card.

items.title: Welcom-Inn Website
items.description: A responsive site for a property-management company to showcase its properties and services. Straightforward on the surface, but built from the ground up.

items.title: Rubicall Website
items.description: A responsive website for a cleaning business. I later came back to expand it when the company moved into Airbnb services.

items.title: MERN Project
items.description: A MERN-stack project that is still in progress. It is not a finished case study yet, and that is the point of calling it a work in progress.

experienceAndSkills.heading: Where I've worked, what I've learned

works.name: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
works.desc: Marketing automation for a Polish automotive client, technical consultation, and a lot of Email Studio: approximately 300 email and SMS messages across several car brands, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and AMPscript.

works.name: Web Developer
works.desc: Designed and built the company's website with HTML, CSS and JavaScript. It is used to advertise the company's properties and services.

works.name: Front-End Web Developer
works.desc: Designed and built the cleaning business's website, then returned to add more when the company moved into Airbnb services.

works.name: Intern Front-End Web Developer
works.desc: A volunteer front-end role: improving individual pages so the site worked and felt better.

works.name: BSc Computing and IT Software
works.desc: Studied Computing and IT Software at The Open University.

osLaunch.headline: The portfolio went a bit further than a portfolio.
osLaunch.description: Open the projects and CV, wander through a 2D career game, or take a break with pinball. Everything lives inside DominikOS.

osShowcase.heading: The not-so-normal bit
osShowcase.lede: DominikOS is this portfolio rebuilt as a retro desktop. The projects, CV and a few games are all inside it, so there is more to explore than a normal page.

features.title: Poke around
features.description: Open projects and the CV in draggable app windows.

features.title: Walk it
features.description: Explore a 2D pixel-art version of the career timeline.

features.title: Take a break
features.description: Play an original cyberpunk pinball table and chase a high score.

contact.heading: Want to say hello?
contact.intro: Questions, feedback or a project to discuss? Email me, find me on LinkedIn or use the form below.

form.validationMessage: Just add your name, email and message first.
form.successMessage: Thanks—your message is on its way.
form.errorMessage: Something went sideways. Please email me directly instead.

footer.osLinkLabel: Open DominikOS and have a look around →
